tasks.label: Run Current File
tasks.command: if [[ ${fileExtname} == .cpp ]]; then g++ -std=c++17 -O2 ${file} -o ${fileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension} && ${fileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension} < ${fileDirname}/input.txt > ${fileDirname}/output.txt; elif [[ ${fileExtname} == .java ]]; then javac ${file} && java -cp ${fileDirname} ${fileBasenameNoExtension} < ${fileDirname}/input.txt > ${fileDirname}/output.txt; else echo Unsupported file; fi && echo Done
